- [ ] Changelog entry included
- [ ] Changelog not required — reason below

### Changelog decision

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] Direct payer-to-recipient settlement preserved
- [ ] No application-held balance introduced
- [ ] Frozen Payment Intent fields preserved
- [ ] Network and asset identity remain explicit
- [ ] Private capability data remains redacted
- [ ] Existing XRP receipt and proof compatibility preserved or explicitly migrated
- [ ] Unsupported conditions fail closed

## Localization

- [ ] English text reviewed
- [ ] Japanese coverage reviewed or tracked
- [ ] Korean coverage reviewed or tracked
- [ ] Locale-independent financial values preserved
- [ ] Not applicable

## Verification

- [ ] Environment check
- [ ] D1 migration and schema checks
- [ ] Lint and type-check
- [ ] Unit and component tests
- [ ] Next.js build
- [ ] Storybook smoke
- [ ] Cloudflare Worker build
- [ ] Browser smoke tests
- [ ] Controlled network transaction where applicable
